output.summary: Legal chunk-wise causal test-time training on validation data paired with an int5-quantized 11-layer net using EMA, pruning, and exclusive self-attention.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Model updates occur only on validation chunks after each chunk is scored, so the training regime operates solely on the validation shard.
techniques: Chunk-wise eval-first causal test-time training on validation shards
Int5-all quantization with EMA plus pruning to fit 16MB
Exclusive self-attention on final layers with Muon optimizer
